name: Retro Synthwave
description: 80s retro-futurism — neon grids, chrome, and sunset gradients from another timeline
art_style: Retro-futuristic synthwave aesthetic, 80s sci-fi book cover art meets Miami Vice. Chrome surfaces, scanline overlays, geometric grids receding to horizon, palm tree silhouettes against gradient skies. VHS tracking artifacts as stylistic choice.
color_palette: Hot magenta, electric cyan, deep purple, chrome silver, sunset orange-to-pink gradients. Black backgrounds with neon glow. Grid lines in teal.
quality_tags: Synthwave digital art, neon glow effects, chrome reflections, retro-futuristic, 80s aesthetic, geometric perspective grid, high detail, poster quality composition.
negative_prompt: photorealistic, natural lighting, muted colors, vintage sepia, cartoon, chibi, sketch, blurry, low quality, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks, generic stock look.
